stage1.why_it_matters_short: Turns faces, smiles and little sounds into shared moments.
stage1.why_it_matters_long: Your baby may be watching your face, softening when you speak and trying tiny coos or smiles. These back-and-forth moments make everyday cuddles, changes and floor play feel shared, while supporting connection, attention and early communication. Your voice, face and pauses are enough.

stage2.mapping_rationale: Mapped from current age-band evidence into the things that can help lane.
stage2.safety_note_public: Use only during supervised awake play; do not place loose mirrors or toys in the sleep space.

top_picks.product_name: Activity Floor Mirror - Pigee Colour Mix
top_picks.best_for: Engaging floor play and visual stimulation
top_picks.title: Floor Mirror Fun
top_picks.description: A vibrant floor mirror designed to encourage self-recognition and visual engagement during tummy time and supervised play.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: This mirror is specifically designed for floor play, promoting visual focus and interaction. Its engaging design aligns with the Stage 1 need for shared moments and early communication.
top_picks.founder_lens: Consider adding a note about the mirror's stability for active babies.

top_picks.best_for: Versatile tummy time and sensory play
top_picks.title: Mirror Book Adventures
top_picks.description: A double-sided fabric book with a large baby-safe mirror, high-contrast patterns, and colorful illustrations to stimulate developing senses.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: The mirror book offers dual-stage development with high-contrast for newborns and a mirror for older infants, supporting visual development and self-awareness, directly addressing the 'finding your face' cluster.
top_picks.founder_lens: Review the single review for potential bias, but the product concept is strong.

top_picks.title: Wally's Reflection
top_picks.description: An engaging floor mirror with a friendly Wally design, perfect for encouraging babies to lift their heads and explore their reflections during tummy time.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: This mirror provides a good value option for encouraging visual engagement and self-discovery during tummy time, aligning with the core need at an accessible price point.
top_picks.founder_lens: No reviews available, so consider this a potential risk for customer satisfaction. Monitor for future reviews.

top_picks.product_name: To Go Activity Mirror - Happy Clouds - Blue
top_picks.title: Cloudy Day Mirror
top_picks.description: A portable activity mirror with a cheerful cloud design, ideal for attaching to prams or car seats for entertainment and self-discovery during outings.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: Its portability makes it suitable for stimulating visual interaction and self-awareness beyond the home environment, supporting continuous engagement with faces and expressions.
top_picks.founder_lens: Ensure this is clearly marketed as a 'to-go' mirror and not a primary floor mirror, to manage expectations.

top_picks.product_name: Activity Mirror w/Clip - Tiny Farm - Green
top_picks.best_for: Clip-on versatility for various play settings
top_picks.title: Clip-On Farm Mirror
top_picks.description: A versatile activity mirror with a convenient clip, allowing it to be attached to playmats, car seats, or cots for interactive play and self-discovery.
top_picks.why_pip_picked_this: The clip-on feature provides flexibility for parents to position the mirror in various locations, maximizing opportunities for the baby to engage with their reflection and fostering early communication.
top_picks.founder_lens: Confirm the clip mechanism is robust and safe for infant use in various settings.

guidance_notes: Prioritize mirrors that are specifically designed for floor play or tummy time, as these directly support the 'finding your face' cluster. Ensure any portable mirrors have secure attachment mechanisms.
